_comment: ShipIt-managed Claude Code settings. Baked into /etc/shipit/managed-settings.json in the session-worker image. The orchestrator always passes --settings to the Claude CLI for the `claude` agent (see src/server/session/claude.ts) so the PreToolUse branch-block hook is always active. The Stop hook self-gates on the SHIPIT_AUTO_CREATE_PR env var, which the orchestrator sets only when autoCreatePr is on — see docs/129-stop-hook-pr-enforcement/plan.md and docs/130-block-branch-ops/plan.md.
